//: demiplane artifact-capture hook. Merge the `hooks` block into your Claude Code settings.json (~/.claude/settings.json for all projects, or .claude/settings.json in a project). Set the env vars below in your shell/profile (or a SessionStart hook). The hook NO-OPs until DEMIPLANE_CAPTURE=1, so wiring it is safe.

//env.DEMIPLANE_TOKEN: bearer token, if your instance requires publish auth
//env.DEMIPLANE_CAPTURE: 1  (turns the hook on; omit/0 to leave it dormant)
//env.DEMIPLANE_PRIVATE: 1  → mint unguessable capability URLs instead of named slugs (optional)
//env.DEMIPLANE_RENDER: 1  → also capture .md files, rendered to HTML server-side (optional)
//env.DEMIPLANE_CAPTURE_DIR: /abs/path  → only capture artifacts written under here (optional)
